title: phymosia umbellata
intro: Phymosia umbellata, also known as the Butterfly Bush, is a flowering shrub native to tropical Asia, characterized by its clusters of small, fragrant flowers. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani practices, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Phymosia umbellata include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
